todos.title: Initialize TanStack Start project with Bun
todos.description: Set up the base TanStack Start project using Bun as the package manager and runtime

todos.title: Configure Shadcn UI with Base UI
todos.description: Install and configure Shadcn UI using Base UI (MUI) primitives with maia style

todos.title: Create sidebar navigation
todos.description: Implement sidebar component with Home and Students navigation items

todos.title: Create empty state components
todos.description: Create reusable empty state component for pages without content

todos.title: Configure root layout with sidebar
todos.description: Update root layout to include SidebarProvider and sidebar components

todos.title: Create Home and Students pages
todos.description: Create route pages for Home and Students with empty states

todos.title: Verify application build and dev server
todos.description: Run build and dev server to verify all components work correctly

todos.title: Implement student list functionality
todos.description: Add ability to display and manage a list of students on the Students page

todos.title: Implement dashboard widgets for Home page
todos.description: Add summary widgets and statistics to the Home page

todos.title: Fix useMemo dependency in announcements route
todos.description: Fix empty dependency array in useMemo at src/routes/announcements.index.tsx:15-18. Add [mockAnnouncements] as dependency or remove useMemo if data is static.

todos.title: Replace useMemo with useEffect for pagination reset
todos.description: Convert useMemo to useEffect at src/components/students/student-table.tsx:60-64. useMemo is being used for side effects (resetting pagination) which is an anti-pattern.

todos.title: Remove deprecated type aliases
todos.description: Delete unused deprecated type aliases (SortField, SortOperator, SortCriterion) from src/types/student.ts:94-99. These have no usage in the codebase.

todos.title: Clean up package.json dependencies
todos.description: Remove react-grab (only loaded via CDN), move shadcn to devDependencies, remove tw-animate-css (no imports found).

todos.title: Extract reusable SidebarMenuItems component
todos.description: Create <SidebarMenuItems items={...} isCollapsed={...} /> component to eliminate duplicate menu item rendering at src/components/app-sidebar.tsx:67-88 and 96-112.

todos.title: Extract color threshold utility function
todos.description: Create getStatusColor(value, thresholds) utility in src/lib/utils.ts to replace repeated color logic at src/components/students/student-table.tsx:314-420 (used 6 times).

todos.title: Add aria-labels to class selector buttons
todos.description: Add descriptive aria-label attributes to level/class buttons at src/components/students/class-selector.tsx:104-131 for accessibility.

todos.title: Add aria-label to notification button
todos.description: Add aria-label="Notifications" to bell icon button at src/components/app-header.tsx:80 for screen reader accessibility.

todos.title: Add aria-label to search input
todos.description: Add aria-label="Search students" to search input at src/components/students/student-filters.tsx:41-47 for accessibility.

todos.title: Add aria-labels to filter popover
todos.description: Add aria-label="Filter students" and aria-expanded state to filter popover button at src/components/students/multi-filter-popover.tsx:530-542.

todos.title: Add aria-labels to pagination
todos.description: Add aria-current="page" to active page button and aria-label="Page N" to all page buttons at src/components/students/student-table.tsx:515-530.

todos.title: Memoize activeFields in multi-filter-popover
todos.description: Wrap activeFields Set computation in useMemo at src/components/students/multi-filter-popover.tsx:395-398 to prevent unnecessary recalculations.

todos.title: Memoize getPageNumbers in student-table
todos.description: Use useMemo or useCallback for pagination calculation at src/components/students/student-table.tsx:79-112 to prevent recalculation on every render.

todos.title: Extract filter field options to config file
todos.description: Move filterFieldOptions from src/components/students/multi-filter-popover.tsx to src/data/filter-config.ts for better organization.

todos.title: Create usePagination custom hook
todos.description: Extract pagination logic from src/components/students/student-table.tsx to a new src/hooks/use-pagination.ts custom hook.

todos.title: Add error boundary to root layout
todos.description: Wrap app in ErrorBoundary component with fallback UI at src/routes/__root.tsx for better error handling.

todos.title: Implement loading skeletons for student table
todos.description: Add loading state with skeleton placeholders to src/routes/students.tsx using the existing src/components/ui/skeleton.tsx component.

todos.title: Improve responsive design for filter toolbar
todos.description: Add flex-col md:flex-row for mobile stacking at src/components/students/student-filters.tsx:37 to prevent overflow on smaller screens.

todos.title: Make Featured card vertical on mobile
todos.description: Update FeaturedAppCard at src/components/app-card.tsx to stack vertically (icon on top, then title, then description) below the sm breakpoint, consistent with the Frequently Used AppCards; original horizontal layout preserved at >=640px.

todos.title: HDP reports redesign: cycle hub + two-stage builder + report document redesign
todos.description: Replace the one-student-at-a-time HDP wizard/split-view builder with a reporting-cycle hub (P1-P2 + hdp-report-builder flag) and a two-stage builder (Stage 1 Layout, Stage 2 Write). Redesign the report document with a single hero 'Term at a glance' visual and typographic descriptor chips, removing the per-section viz system entirely. New src/lib/hdp-cycle-store.ts and src/lib/hdp-report-commit.ts; new routes reports.cycle.layout.tsx and reports.cycle.write.$studentId.tsx; reworked reports.index.tsx (cycle hub) and reports.$id.tsx (layout-aware detail); deleted the old wizard (generate-hdp-wizard + steps) and reports.build.tsx. Per plan at redesign-this-flow-and-snuggly-platypus.md.

todos.title: Layout page polish: SC-aware preview, demoted template, sticky preview
todos.description: Set up layout page: honest "Awaiting data from School Cockpit" placeholders in the preview for unsubmitted subjects (mock-cockpit-submissions), template select demoted to a static Based-on line in report mode, preview sticky on wide screens with scroll-into-view + highlight when a section is toggled on, removed misleading drag grip from section list

todos.title: Report document redesign: growth-bar descriptor scales
todos.description: ReportPreview redesign — LO and personal-quality descriptors render as growth bars (filled segments to the achieved stage, stage named per row, staggered fill animation), subject icons + per-teacher School Cockpit provenance captions, How to read this report accordion legend, Packaged from School Cockpit freshness line, signed form-teacher comment, attendance as three inline stats. Replaces descriptor chips.

todos.title: Layout control page: display options, templates, drag reorder
todos.description: Set up layout page rework — per-section Show progress as toggle (Growth bar / Labels) on scale-bearing sections, template picker with School templates + My templates groups, Edited-differs-from-template indicator, Save as template dialog capturing sections+order+display, drag-to-reorder via grip handle with arrow buttons kept as the keyboard path. ReportBlock gains display field, persisted through cycle store and templates.

todos.title: Parent-readability pass on the report document
todos.description: ReportPreview: audience prop (teacher/parent) gates School Cockpit provenance to teacher surfaces; hero gains days-late and a Strongest in / Growing in highlights line derived from submitted subjects only; LO rows are tap-to-expand revealing the full learning-outcome statement; How to read this report legend removed; standalone Attendance section removed (hero is the single source); personal-quality definitions wrap fully.

todos.title: Subject story cards in the report document
todos.description: Subjects render as collapsible cards: icon + subject + teacher, a deterministic summary sentence built from LO stages (strongest/building phrasing, uniform-stage variants), and LO growth-bar rows behind a tap. Teachers default expanded, parents collapsed. Single-semester view — progression deferred per user direction. Awaiting-data card unchanged.

todos.title: Replace growth bars with soft stage pills
todos.description: Expanded subject cards and personal qualities now show one tinted pill per row (single blue family, deeper tint = further along) instead of segmented growth bars — decluttering the expanded view. Layout page display toggle relabelled Pills / Text. Growth-bar component and its keyframes removed.

todos.title: Declutter pass: flatten disclosure, 4 subjects, hero layout
todos.description: Report document declutter from design critique — all disclosure removed (LO statements always visible as sublabels, subject cards always open, no chevrons); Social Studies added as 4th P1 subject with authentic LOs; awaiting-data gaps cleared so every subject shows mock data; hero highlights moved to a full-width line; Write page uses compactPupilInfo to stop repeating student identity under the page header.

todos.title: Certificate-style hero: identity band, highlights first
todos.description: Report hero reworked after Duolingo English Test reference — identity band with initials avatar (name, class, term left; form teacher + provenance right), Strongest in / Growing in tinted panels with area chips lead the at-a-glance card, attendance and conduct demoted to quiet icon-chip bullet rows, big attendance ring removed from the document.

todos.title: Header cleanup + vibrant stage pills
todos.description: Removed the Packaged-from-School-Cockpit provenance line from the document; subject teacher now sits right-aligned in each subject card header (no date), matching the identity band placement; stage pills brightened — top stage (Accomplished / Demonstrates Very Strongly) is solid brand blue with white text, remaining stages step down through the tints. Dead audience prop plumbing removed.

todos.title: Policy LO copy + growth-ramp pill colours
todos.description: P1 learning-outcome names and statements replaced with the policy wording from the school HDP sample (English Speaking/Reading/Listening, Chinese incl. Reading aloud, Maths Number sense/Computation/Geometry/Data handling, Social Studies) in a P1-only outcome map so secondary is untouched. Stage pills recoloured to the Option A growth ramp: outlined neutral Beginning, amber Developing, light lime Competent, saturated lime Accomplished; quality levels mapped across the same ramp.
